Title: Mockup T-Shirt Design Template for Long Sleeve Crewneck Sweatshirt
Description:
This high-quality product mockup template provides a detailed outline of a long sleeve crewneck sweatshirt or t-shirt. It is designed for apparel graphic designers, fashion brands, and print-on-demand sellers to visualize and place custom artwork accurately.

  • Versatility: Suitable for printing designs on various materials, including cotton, fleece, jersey, and blends.
  • Realistic Shape: The template captures the natural drape and specific dimensions of a standard long-sleeve crewneck, allowing for precise placement of logos, text, and illustrations.
  • Ideal Use Cases: Perfect for merchandising, creating branded corporate apparel, sportswear lines, or unique gift items.

Use this guide to ensure your artwork aligns perfectly with the garment's structure, resulting in professional and appealing final products.
